_description: Model derivations for Switzerland vs Colombia R16 2026-07-07/08

elo_context.method: Computed by running WC2026 match history through WFE formula (K=60, neutral=TRUE for all WC matches)
elo_context.note_arg_alg_score: ARG vs ALG (Jun 16) result not in local data — assumed ARG 2-0 ALG for ELO calc. ALG ELO entering SUI-ALG was ~1882.9. Final ALG ELO used ≈1850 after SUI-ALG loss.

lambda_fits.note: ELO Poisson model (b0=0.10408, b2=0.0018099, neutral venue, b1 term=0). No Smarkets individual team goal markets available pre-match to fit from; using ELO-derived lambdas as base.
notes_on_lambda: λ_SUI=0.951 reflects COL's superior ELO (85-point advantage). SUI's WC form is strong (W3D1) but ELO already incorporates those results.
λ_COL=1.295 consistent with COL's attacking output (avg 19.7 shots per group game). Colombia has been the better attacking team in WC2026.
Total λ=2.246 → expect ~2.2 goals per regulation (moderate scoring, competitive R16 match).
Cards λ=2.5 uses SUI avg 1.0 YC + COL avg ~1.5 YC with small knockout intensity boost.

dan_ndoye.note: Ndoye has been SUI's top shooter in 2 of 3 group games. ~25% goal share estimate; liquid market likely 22-28%.

breel_embolo.note: Embolo as striker gets roughly 50% of SUI's SOT at his position. Under Poisson.

luis_diaz.note: Díaz scored 1 goal + 1 assist in group stage. Among COL's most consistent attackers.

jhon_arias.note: Score-or-assist is wider scope. Arias is active in COL's attacks. Production unclear from group stage notes.

rule_checks.RULE7: INACTIVE — SUI win=26.7% ≥ 15% threshold. Not a heavy underdog scenario.
rule_checks.RULE8: FIRES — Draw=29.5% ≥ 25%. Competitive match; shade model-derived estimates toward 0.50.
rule_checks.RULE6: All final estimates should fall in 0.13-0.87 range. Flag any outlier estimates.
rule_checks.RULE9: James Rodríguez: NOT asked about in platform questions. If Arias market shows inflated prices for sub-contributors, trim.
rule_checks.RULE12: Q6 (SUI 4+ SOT): SUI's SOT is volatile (7,7,4 in groups). Removing the 4-SOT Canada game (when SUI were dominated) shifts P(4+) up significantly. Adjusted λ=4.5 reflects SUI vs stronger opponent but maintains their high-SOT tendency.
rule_checks.RULE15: NOT applicable — SUI 26.7% win prob > 10% blowout threshold.

espn_insight.colombia_goals_from: Luis Díaz (1), Jaminton Campaz (1), Daniel Muñoz (2), Colombia team total = 5 goals in 4 games
espn_insight.note_on_match_dynamics: Both teams have W3D1 records in WC2026. COL is ELO-favored. SUI is resilient and low-conceding. Expect compact match, potential for low-scoring encounter. Over 2.5 goals only 39% likely.
